sections.paragraph:
Original: אפרסתכי אפרסכי

Transliteration: 'ăpharsekay 'ăpharsathkay

Phonetic: af-ar-sek-ah'ee

BDB Definition:

Apharsathchites = "I will divide the deceivers (?)"
  1. (CLBL) an unknown office
  2. (BDB) perhaps an office or an official
  3. (TWOT)
    1. a people
    2. perhaps a title of an official

Origin: of foreign origin

TWOT entry: 2599,2600

Part(s) of speech: Proper Name Masculine
